name: Granville Pickleball Court
description: Granville Pickleball Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Krepps Park
description: Krepps Park is a place to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Marilla Park Pickleball
description: Marilla Park Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms and water. The court is free.

name: Mylan Park  Sports Complex
description: Mylan Park Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There are 12 wood courts. 6 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available.

name: Wesley United Methodist Church
description: Wesley United Methodist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The court is private.

name: West View Tennis Center
description: West View Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morgantown, WV. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights.
